nasb.text: His spirit departs, he returns to the earth; In that very day his thoughts perish.

esv.text: When his breath departs, he returns to the earth; on that very day his plans perish.

cnv.text: 他們的氣一斷，就歸回塵土； 他們所計劃的，當天就幻滅了。

ccb.text: 他们气息一断，便归回尘土， 他们的打算转眼成空。

csbs.text: 他们的气一断，就归回尘土； 他们所谋划的在当日就消亡了。
